THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT BART TRUCKING COMPANY GIUDICE, FRANK TAKE NOTHING FROM PLAINTIFF STARLITE ELECTRIC, INC. ALSO, CROSS-COMPLAINANTS BART TURCKING, FRANK GIUDICE AND SAL GIUDICE SHALL TAKE NOTHING ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT FROM CROSS-DEFENDANT, STARLITE ELECTRIC AND BILL LEE. BILL LEE IS ENTITLED TO COSTS OF $320 ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. OTHERWISE, NONE OF THE PARTIES SHALL RECOVER COSTS OR ATTORNEYS FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.

COURT TRIAL HELD ON FEB-02-2007 IN DEPT. 505. THE COURT FINDS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANTS IN THE COMPLAINT AND IN FAVOR OF CROSS-DEFENDANTS IN THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. CROSS-DEFT, WILLIAM LEE IS ENTITLED TO $320, COSTS. ALL EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENSE COUNSEL, JOHN WILEY WITH PLAINTIFF COUNSEL'S CONSENT. JUDGE JOHN E. MUNTER;REPORTER RHONDA AQUILINA;CLERK T.MARUYAMA (D-505)
